title: FinGEAR: Financial Mapping-Guided Enhanced Answer Retrieval

authors.name: Not specified in the provided text
affiliations: The Artificial Intelligence Applications Institute, The University of Edinburgh, United Kingdom

abstract: FinGEAR (Financial Mapping-Guided Enhanced Answer Retrieval) is a retrieval-centric framework designed for long, professionally authored, semi-structured disclosures like financial 10-K filings. It addresses three core limitations in current retrieval pipelines: lack of structure awareness, lack of financial specificity, and challenges with dense-only retrieval. FinGEAR introduces Document-Query hierarchical alignment, Financial Lexicon-Aware Mapping (FLAM), and hybrid dense-sparse retrieval.
key_contributions: Document-Query hierarchical alignment using Summary Tree and Question Tree
problem_addressed: Retrieval bottleneck in financial NLP tasks due to hierarchical organization, domain terms, and need for precise evidence in financial analysis
